name: oled_display_ssd1309
description: OLED SSD1309 display plugin for Volumio – shows playback info, clock, progress, audio format, and volume on a 128x64 I2C OLED
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Drives a 128x64 SSD1309 I2C OLED display showing playback info, clock, progress bar, audio format, volume overlay, and screensaver. Designed for Raspberry Pi with zero MPD interference.
volumio_info.changelog: v1.7.28: Plugin store reviewer feedback applied — install.sh slimmed from 194 to 65 lines, I2C module load + display auto-detection moved to runtime, saveConfig now uses v-conf's standard set()/save() API, bundled i2c_address default is empty for first-run detection. v1.7.27: Bluetooth no-metadata screens (v1.7.24-v1.7.26) removed; retained the 'bt' SKIP_TRACK_TYPES entry.
